hero.title: Crystal Community Center
hero.subtitle: The Perfect Venue for Your Cherished Moments
hero.mission: Established in 2022, we provide premium facilities for weddings, meetings, and celebrations in the heart of Gobindaganj.

about.title: About Us
about.history: Founded in 2022 by Abu Fattab Shah Md Eleas, Crystal Community Center has successfully hosted over 100+ events. Our mission is to provide an elegant, hassle-free environment for all your special occasions.
about.owner: Abu Fattab Shah Md Eleas (Owner, Former Sub-Assistant Agriculture Officer)

programs.title: Programs & Services
programs.weddingDesc: Complete wedding venue services with customizable decoration.
programs.meetingDesc: Professional setups for corporate meetings and seminars.
programs.conferenceDesc: Large scale conference facilities with audio-visual support.
programs.celebrationDesc: Birthdays, anniversaries, and special milestone events.

facilities.title: Our Facilities
facilities.aircon: Full Hall Air Conditioning — climate-controlled comfort throughout the entire venue.
facilities.cooking: Large Cooking Space (3 Burners + Washing area)
facilities.layout: 3rd Floor: Main Hall, Stages, Reception. 4th Floor: Rooftop, Cooking.
facilities.extras: Ample Storage, Large Utensils included. Decoration available.
facilities.airc: Total Air Conditioning Capacity of Cooling (BTU)：16,800.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Glimpses of our successful events and beautiful setups.
